name: ACE Cash Express
description_short: ACE Cash Express offers small emergency loans, title loans, check cashing, and financial services through physical store locations across the U.S.
description_long:
ACE Cash Express operates as a financial services company with a network of physical store locations across multiple states. The company has been in the emergency lending space, serving consumers who need quick access to cash for unexpected expenses. Their business model centers on brick-and-mortar locations where customers can apply for and receive funds on the same day or next business day.

ACE's service portfolio includes installment loans, title loans (collateral-based lending), check cashing, bill payment services, money transfers, and tax preparation services. They also offer online loan options for qualifying customers. The company maintains customer service channels via phone and email, with separate departments for general inquiries and online loan operations. Their product range indicates they serve customers across different financial needs, from immediate cash emergencies to tax-related services.

ACE positions itself as a multi-service financial alternative to traditional banking, with an emphasis on accessibility and speed of funding. Their willingness to offer title loans and small installment products suggests they serve customers with limited traditional credit access. The company also maintains compliance programs, including California privacy notices and state-specific loan availability restrictions.

The reliance on physical store locations means accessibility varies significantly by geography, as evidenced by the Colorado location pages returning 404 errors and certain loan types being unavailable in specific states. The company's emergency lending focus places it in the high-cost lending category, typical of the payday and title loan industry, which consumers should evaluate carefully against alternatives.
pros: Multiple service offerings including installment loans, title loans, check cashing, and bill payments in one location
Same-day or next-day funding available for emergency cash needs
Online loan options for customers who prefer digital applications
Nationwide network of physical store locations for in-person service
Money transfer services available at store locations
Tax preparation services offered at select locations
Established customer service channels with dedicated phone lines and email support
cons: Specific location pages (Colorado/Denver) return 404 errors, suggesting website navigation or store information issues
Loan availability varies significantly by state, with some products unavailable in certain states including Colorado
No pricing, APR, or fee information provided on accessible website pages
Physical store dependency means limited accessibility in rural or underserved areas
Temporary closures documented (New Orleans hurricane closure), indicating vulnerability to disruptions
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash access for emergency expenses without access to traditional bank loans
Customers with vehicles who can use title loans as collateral for larger emergency amounts
People who prefer or require in-person financial services and immediate fund receipt
Customers needing multiple financial services bundled at a single location (check cashing, bill payment, loans)
diagnosis: ACE Cash Express is best for consumers facing genuine emergencies who have access to a nearby physical location and need same-day or next-day cash. The primary caveat is that emergency lending from companies like ACE typically carries high APRs and fees—critical information that is not available on their accessible web pages, making it essential for potential borrowers to contact them directly for pricing before applying.

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Populus Financial Group, Inc. (F/K/A Ace Cash Express)
